summary: Screening of official/repo sources: GPT-5.6 in Copilot, Claude Code origin story, Codex updates, DeepSeek rate limits, MCP SDK beta, DeerFlow, Mitos sandbox, and agent eval research. No user workflow reports in this shard. | Agent sandboxing, security, and workflow tooling dominate discussion; OpenAI and Anthropic ship major product updates; user workflow reports highlight admin use and eval gaps.
